plugin.name: eqnamer
plugin.description:
NEAC's event naming plugin.
Uses a set of polygons and points of interest to set the region name description of seismic events, with several customizable templates that are used in different situations.
Each template should be a list of strings. Each string will have any @placeholders@ interpolated, any emtpy strings will be removed, then the resulting nonempty strings will be glued together with ', '.
The available placeholders are:
- @epi_description@: Coarse description of the epicentre/earthquake location. This is built from the country in which the location falls, and any special crust type (e.g. "Coastal" or "Offshore") assigned to the polygon in which the location falls. e.g. "Japan", "Coastal India", "Offshore", "". - @poi@: Place name of a point of interest. e.g. "Singleton, NSW", "Paris" - @poi_country@: Name of the country containing the point of interest. e.g. "Australia", "France" - @dist@: Distance from the point of interest to the epicentre in kilometres. e.g. 125 - @dir@: Compass direction from the point of interest to the epicentre, e.g. SW

parameter.name: citiesPath
parameter.description: Path to an XML file containing a cities dataset, in the same format as the cities.xml shipping with seiscomp.

parameter.name: regionsPath
parameter.description: Path to a GeoJSON or BNA file containing a collection of named polygons.

parameter.name: countriesPath
parameter.description: Path to a GeoJSON or BNA file containing a collection of named polygons describing countries, with the country name in the property Primary_ID.

parameter.name: homeCountry
parameter.description: Country to treat as the home country. If both the epicenter and the point of interest fall in the home country, the country name will be omitted from @epi_description@.

parameter.name: nearbyPlaceTemplate
approximate
parameter.description: Template used for non-reviewed events when the epicenter and the point of interest fall in the same country. Supported placeholders are @epi_description@, @poi@, @poi_country@, @dist@, and @dir@.

parameter.name: precise
parameter.description: Template used for reviewed events when the epicenter and the point of interest fall in the same country. Supported placeholders are @epi_description@, @poi@, @poi_country@, @dist@, and @dir@.

parameter.name: approximate
parameter.description: Template used for non-reviewed events when the POI and epicenter fall in different countries. Supported placeholders are @epi_description@, @poi_country@, @dist@, @dir@, and @poi@.

parameter.name: precise
